SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation

Interface AIiDocumentationBlockElement

All Superinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
AIiDocumentationCodeBlock, AIiDocumentationContainerElement, AIiDocumentationDocument, AIiDocumentationParagraph, AIiDocumentationSection, AIiDocumentationTable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AIcDocumentationBlockElement, AIcDocumentationCodeBlock, AIcDocumentationContainerElement, AIcDocumentationDocument, AIcDocumentationParagraph, AIcDocumentationSection, AIcDocumentationTable
public interface AIiDocumentationBlockElement extends AIiDocumentationElement
Represents a block-level documentation element.

Block elements form the structural body of a document. They may be rendered as standalone output units such as sections, paragraphs, tables, or code blocks. Inline elements such as links and references are not block elements and should normally appear inside paragraph-like elements.

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.AIiDocumentationElement

    getElementId, getMetadata, getMetadataValue, putMetadataValue, removeMetadataValue
